nasb.text: Judge for yourselves: is it proper for a woman to pray to God with her head uncovered?

esv.text: Judge for yourselves: is it proper for a wife to pray to God with her head uncovered?

cnv.text: 你們自己判斷一下，女人向　神禱告的時候不蒙頭，是合適的嗎？

ccb.text: 你们自行斟酌吧，女人向上帝祷告时不蒙头合适吗？

csbs.text: 你们自己判断吧：女人不蒙着头向神祷告是合宜的吗？
